prompt: Create a premium futuristic streetwear campaign poster featuring a confident young male model in a modern studio setup. Full body pose, relaxed but powerful stance, one foot placed on a metallic cube, hands inside jacket pockets, head tilted slightly upward with a calm bold expression. Lean physique, textured messy hair, sharp jawline. Outfit includes an oversized silver bomber jacket, black fitted tee, wide leg cargo trousers, layered chain accessories, and chunky sneakers. Clean luxury styling with subtle branding details. Background is a smooth matte gray studio wall with giant bold condensed typography reading “VISION” stretched vertically across the backdrop behind the model. Text should dominate the frame while the subject stands centered in front. Floor is glossy reflective concrete style surface with subtle reflections and soft shadows. Metallic props placed around the floor for depth and fashion campaign energy. Lighting is dramatic studio lighting with soft directional highlights, crisp contrast, polished commercial finish. Sharp focus, ultra realistic fabric texture, cinematic mood, premium fashion ad quality. Style should feel bold, modern, luxury, minimal, urban editorial campaign, clean composition, high contrast tones, sleek branding aesthetic, high resolution, square format.
